situation: Local segmentation path (maskToBoundingBox in segmentation.ts) discards oversized bboxes entirely (return null) when area > areaThreshold, while VL path (shrinkToThreshold in vision-adapter.ts) shrinks them to center. This asymmetry causes valid large product detections to be silently dropped when using local segmentation fallback.
action: Replace discard-with-null with shrink-to-center logic matching VL path's shrinkToThreshold: compute shrinkRatio = sqrt((areaThreshold * 0.9) / area), scale width/height, recenter x/y. Applied via case-104 direct-edit channel due to cp-guard (segmentation.ts already diverged in worktree from prior unmerged fixes).
outcome_evidence: Commit fcfb280 on auto/opt-background-1783213292 pushed to origin. maskToBoundingBox now shrinks oversized bboxes to center instead of returning null, matching shrinkToThreshold behavior in vision-adapter.ts:399-411.
next_suggestion: Continue dispatching pending SZ-BG-L-008 (pipelineProgress sendMessage fire-and-forget swallows errors) or SZ-SP-L-001 (deletedStack stale closure). 22 route-fixes remaining from audit-2026-07-07-047.

audit_findings.finding: maskToBoundingBox discards large bboxes (return null) while VL path shrinkToThreshold preserves them by shrinking to center — behavioral inconsistency causes silent detection loss in local segmentation fallback
audit_findings.remediation: Replace return null with shrink-to-center: shrinkRatio = sqrt((areaThreshold*0.9)/area), scale w/h, recenter x/y
